candidate_summary: FRUSTULE-FT: bottom-up self-assembling LoRA adapters via cooperative cross-rank binding objective producing emergent rank hierarchy (rank-2 -> rank-8 -> rank-32) inspired by diatom silica frustule self-assembly.

results.title: Diatom frustule nanomechanical (Sci Reports 2023)
results.reason: Source-domain biology paper on diatom frustule mechanics; no LLM/LoRA content. Zero overlap with the llm_application target which is about adapter self-assembly. Provides only the biological inspiration, not a functional LLM analogue.

results.title: HiLo Hierarchical Configuration for Mixture of Adapter Experts (2025/2)
results.reason: HiLo configures rank/count per-layer top-down — shares the 'hierarchical adapter' surface but mechanism is prescribed top-down configuration, not bottom-up cooperative self-assembly with emergent rank hierarchy. Partial functional similarity (hierarchy + adapters) but inverted directionality. Single keyword 'hierarchical' matches; below hit thresholds.

results.title: Towards Modular LLMs: Library of LoRAs (2024/5)
results.reason: Library retrieval/routing of pre-built LoRAs — no merging, no cooperative binding, no emergent hierarchy. Modularity surface only; functionally different from self-assembly.

results.title: LoRAFusion (2025/10)
results.reason: LoRAFusion is about efficient fine-tuning compute fusion, not cooperative cross-rank binding nor emergent hierarchy. Shares LoRA domain only; no self-assembly mechanism.

results.title: K-Merge: Online Continual LoRA Merging (2026/3)
results.reason: Online continual LoRA merging shares the merging-of-LoRAs functional core, but lacks explicit cross-rank cooperative binding objective and emergent rank hierarchy (rank-2 -> rank-8 -> rank-32). Partial match on the merging mechanism; misses the bottom-up hierarchical emergence. Func at boundary (0.70). Single keyword 'merging' matches.

results.title: MoA: Heterogeneous Mixture of Adapters with Sigmoid Gating (2026/4)
results.reason: Mixture-of-Adapters with gating combines heterogeneous adapters via learned gates — not self-assembly, no merging, no emergent rank hierarchy. Surface-level adapter composition but mechanically distinct from cooperative binding -> merging.

results.title: CompAs: Compositional Adapter Sum for Context Scaling (2025/10)
results.reason: CompAs sums adapter parameters compositionally for context scaling — single-step sum, no hierarchy, no cooperative binding objective, no emergent rank levels. Explicitly flagged as different in candidate's novelty claim.

results.title: Emergent Hierarchical Adapters via Cooperative Self-Merging (2025/9)
results.reason: Direct functional match. Small LoRA adapters merge through learned cooperative loss into larger rank clusters with emergent hierarchy — this is essentially the same construct as FRUSTULE-FT (cooperative binding objective + bottom-up rank hierarchy + adapter self-merging). Keyword substrings: 'hierarchical', 'adapter', 'cooperative', 'emergent' all match. The biological framing differs but the LLM-side mechanism is equivalent.

verdict.rationale: Rank 8 (Emergent Hierarchical Adapters via Cooperative Self-Merging, arxiv 2509.16842) is a direct LLM-side anticipation: cooperative self-merging of small adapters into emergent rank hierarchy is the precise mechanism FRUSTULE-FT claims as novel. The biological-inspiration framing (diatom silica) is fresh but the operative LLM construct is already published. Rank 5 (K-Merge) provides additional partial coverage on the merging operation. Novelty claim against HiLo/Library/CompAs holds, but the candidate's novelty claim fails to address the strongest prior (2509.16842).

notes: Calibration honored: rank 8 func=0.92 (within 0.85-0.95), rank 5 func=0.70 (within 0.65-0.75 upper bound), rank 2 HiLo func=0.60 (within 0.55-0.70), rank 6 MoA func=0.55 (within 0.5-0.65).
